case_title: CORAL, JUAN CARLOS VS TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE (R/O) et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORAL, JUAN CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE  (R/O) AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC INC. SNOOK, RICK ALLEN  (DRIVER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORAL, JUAN CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE  (R/O) AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC INC. SNOOK, RICK ALLEN  (DRIVER) $1,102.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CORAL, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE  (R/O) AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC INC. SNOOK, RICK ALLEN  (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-20-1997, GRANTED
